# Tasks: [GAME NAME]

**Spec**: [docs/games/<name>-spec.md]

**Plan**: [docs/games/<name>-plan.md]

---

## Build checklist

- [ ] **T1** — Player approved spec summary
- [ ] **T2** — Scaffold: `npm run new-game -- [name]` (skip if folder exists)
- [ ] **T3** — Canvas + game loop (`createCanvas`, `loop`, `clearCanvas`)
- [ ] **T4** — Player / main object + controls (`Input`)
- [ ] **T5** — Core mechanic: [e.g. movement, collecting, shooting]
- [ ] **T6** — Win condition
- [ ] **T7** — Lose condition + game over screen
- [ ] **T8** — Score / HUD (if in spec)
- [ ] **T9** — Look and feel (colors, text from spec)
- [ ] **T10** — Playtest all P1 acceptance checks
- [ ] **T11** — `npm run build -- [name]` succeeds
- [ ] **T12** — `docs/games/[name].md` + game `README.md` updated
- [ ] **T13** — Mark spec **Implemented**

---

## P2 backlog (do not block v1)

- [ ] [nice-to-have from spec]
